title: Authentication
description: Securely sign in users with email/password, Google, Facebook, and other OAuth providers with just a few lines of code.

title: Firestore Database
description: Store and sync app data in real-time using a flexible, scalable NoSQL cloud database built for modern apps.

title: Realtime Database
description: Sync data across all clients in real-time with a JSON-based database that works seamlessly offline.
